title: Name of instance inside "for" loop clashes with name of an instance located outside of the loop scope
body:
---


Author Name: **Igor Lesik**
Original Redmine Issue: 749 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-04-24
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

```
for ( ... ) begin
  mymodule inst_name(...);
end

mymodule inst_name(...);

```
